findings.title: Root orchestrator has unbounded tool access
findings.recommendation: Define explicit tool boundaries per orchestration tier

findings.title: Workflow agents can invoke arbitrary shell commands
findings.recommendation: Implement command allowlist per agent role

findings.title: Inter-agent coordination uses unsigned messages
findings.recommendation: Add HMAC-SHA256 signatures to delegation messages

findings.title: Shared API keys across orchestration tiers
No delegation proof chain between orchestrator tiers
Context memory writes lack schema validation
findings.recommendation: Add pydantic models for all memory operations

findings.title: No process isolation between orchestrator tiers
findings.recommendation: Run each tier in separate process/container

findings.title: High-impact workflow actions lack approval gate
No per-agent resource limits on orchestrator spawns
findings.recommendation: Set CPU/memory/time limits per spawned agent
